assertion_results.text: An index.html file is produced and renders without errors
No CSS gradient (linear-gradient/radial-gradient/conic-gradient) is used as a background on the page, sidebar, cards, or metric tiles
No glassmorphism: no backdrop-filter: blur() on panels or the sidebar
Largest border-radius on cards/sidebar/buttons is <= 16px (no rounded-2xl/3xl everywhere)
assertion_results.evidence: max non-full radius ~8px (rounded-md, rounded-lg); rounded-full uses: 0

assertion_results.text: No box-shadow with blur radius > 24px and no colored (non-black/neutral) shadow
assertion_results.evidence: max non-full radius ~8px (rounded-md, rounded-lg); rounded-full uses: 0

assertion_results.text: The primary/accent color is neutral or a single restrained hue, not a blue/indigo/cyan brand pop
assertion_results.evidence: no obvious blue/indigo/cyan accent utilities (heuristic — confirm visually)

assertion_results.text: No hero section or large decorative headline block inside the dashboard
No eyebrow/kicker labels (uppercase + letter-spacing) above headings
Body font is Geist or a system stack, not Inter/Roboto/Segoe UI
Surfaces are differentiated by background token + 1px border, not by floating detached panels
